name: DAYLIFE-V3
description: Test GitHub Pages for DAYLIFE app

name: HK-Telegram-Mini-App-Clone
description: A clone of the popular Telegram mini app Hamster Kombat (clicker game), built with Vite, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS

name: daylife-telegram-app
description: DAYLIFE A minimalist life counter Telegram WebApp that shows your total days lived, inspires daily reflection, and rewards users for acting on their dreams.

name: DAYLIFE-app
description: DAYLIFE is a minimalist life-counter app that shows how many days you’ve already lived and how many remain out of 30,000. It helps you reflect, act on your dreams, and celebrate daily progress. Each sunrise becomes a reminder: every day counts. what will you do with yours? 🌞

name: nava-peace
description: A global platform to inspire daily acts of peace and community connection through NAVA tokens.
